recommendations.title: Tarzan the Ape Man

recommendations.title: Tarzan
recommendations.overview: Tarzan was a small orphan who was raised by an ape named Kala since he was a child. He believed that this was his family, but on an expedition Jane Porter is rescued by Tarzan. He then finds out that he's human. Now Tarzan must make the decision as t

recommendations.title: Tarzan Finds a Son!
recommendations.overview: A young couple die in a plane crash in the jungle. Their son is found by Tarzan and Jane who name him Boy and raise him as their own. Five years later a search party comes to find the young heir to millions of dollars. Jane agrees, against Tarzan's w

recommendations.title: Tarzan
recommendations.overview: One of the most classic and revered stories of all time, Edgar Rice Burroughs' Tarzan returns to the big screen for a new generation. Tarzan and Jane face a mercenary army dispatched by the evil CEO of Greystoke Energies, a man who took over the comp

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: Tarzan Escapes
recommendations.overview: White hunter Captain Fry tries to take Tarzan back to civilization, caged for public display. He arrives in the jungle with Jane's cousins, Eric and Rita, who want Jane's help in claiming a fortune left her.

recommendations.title: Tarzan and His Mate
recommendations.overview: Harry Holt returns to Africa with his friend Martin Arlington to head up a large ivory expedition.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man 2

recommendations.title: Tarzan & Jane
recommendations.overview: With the first anniversary of her wedding to Tarzan beckoning, Jane ponders how to make it the perfect English celebration.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Don MacKinnon, Steve Loter, Lisa Schaffer
